channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: modaic-ai/gepa-viz
item.description: Interactive live visualizer for gepa runs

item.title: yui540/comimi
item.description: Open-source comic reader library for JS/TS

item.title: gnurio/tufte-vdqi-plugin
item.description: Give your AI agents the skill of visualizing data the way Edward Tufte intended.

item.title: 7etsuo/project-based-tutorials-in-c
item.description: Curated project-based C tutorials for building emulators, kernels, databases, games, compilers, shells, and low-level tools.

item.title: Hmbown/CodeWhale
item.description: Coding agent for open source, open weight models

item.title: tspader/sp
item.description: A modern C standard library

item.title: jianshuo/ccglass
item.description: See what your coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Kimi) sends to the model — local proxy + web dashboard

item.title: VILA-Lab/FigMirror
item.description: An Automated AI Agent Tool for Plotting Your Data in Any Paper's Figure Style.

item.title: Doorman11991/smallcode
item.description: AI coding agent optimized for small LLMs. 87% benchmark with 4B-active model.

item.title: leodavinci1/kanbots
item.description: Local collaboration interface for working on a kanban board where each task is either a Claude Code or Codex agent.

item.title: apple/corecrypto
item.description: Apple corecrypto

item.title: open-gsd/get-shit-done-redux
item.description: Getting Shit Done, the Aftermath

item.title: 0xSero/codex-shim
item.description: Local Responses-API shim that exposes Factory BYOK models (and optional ChatGPT GPT-5.5 passthrough) to Codex Desktop.

item.title: Nutlope/hallmark
item.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

item.title: perplexityai/bumblebee
item.description: Read-only tool for inventorying packages, extensions, and developer-tool metadata on macOS and Linux developer endpoints, built for fast supply-chain exposure checks.

item.title: Jawaz-Keyzor/CS2-External-Cheat-2026
item.description: External gameplay assistant for CS2. Provides visual overlay through screen capture analysis — wall transparency visualization, sound radar, grenade trajectory helper. No memory access, no injection. Educational project for studying computer vision and overlay rendering.

item.title: viticci/shortcuts-playground-plugin
item.description: Shortcuts Playground: A Claude Code and Codex plugin for building, validating, signing, and remixing macOS/iOS Shortcuts with natural language.

item.title: simplifaisoul/osiris
item.description: Open Source Global Intelligence Platform - Real-Time OSINT Dashboard - A Palantir Alternative

item.title: google/ax
item.description: Google's open source distributed agent runtime

item.title: neilsonnn/image-blaster
item.description: An image-to-world skillset for Claude.

item.title: truelockmc/streambert
item.description: A cross-platform Electron Desktop App to stream and download any Movie, TV Series or Anime in the World. Zero Ads and Tracking

item.title: wiltodelta/remove-ai-watermarks
item.description: CLI and library for removing visible (Gemini) and invisible (SynthID, C2PA, EXIF) AI watermarks from images

item.title: orailnoor/DroidDesk
item.description: DroidDesk turns your Android phone into a real Linux desktop using Termux, Termux X11, TUR, and Proot. Run VS Code, Firefox, LibreOffice, Blender, and more with X11 or VNC support for monitor setup.

item.title: kageroumado/phosphene
item.description: A video wallpaper engine for macOS Tahoe

item.title: zakirullin/files.md
item.description: 🌱 Private, quiet space for thinking. A simple app for your .md files.

item.title: AndrewPrifer/liquid-dom
item.description: (no description)

item.title: GoogleChrome/modern-web-guidance
item.description: (no description)

item.title: mattzh72/articraft
item.description: An Agentic System for Scalable Articulated 3D Asset Generation

item.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: Nightmare-Eclipse/YellowKey
item.description: YellowKey Bitlocker Bypass Vulnerability

item.title: google-antigravity/antigravity-sdk-python
item.description: (no description)

item.title: tinyhumansai/openhuman
item.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

item.title: anthropics/claude-for-legal
item.description: A suite of plugins for legal workflows

item.title: dv2202/ChatApplication
item.description: Real-time, room-based chat app with WebSockets — no sign-up, just pick a room ID and start chatting. Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript frontend, Node.js ws backend.

item.title: FoundZiGu/GuJumpgate
item.description: (no description)

item.title: thananon/9arm-skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: antoinezambelli/forge
item.description: A Python framework for self-hosted LLM tool-calling and multi-step agentic workflows

item.title: vercel-labs/zerolang
item.description: The programming language for agents

item.title: vercel-labs/zerolang
item.description: The programming language for agents

item.title: affaan-m/ECC
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.title: Andyyyy64/whichllm
item.description: Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

item.title: rmyndharis/OpenWA
item.description: Free, Open Source, Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway

item.title: EVV1E/waylandcraft
item.description: Wayland Compositor in Minecraft
